text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
——One moment, Bouquet-san! There's a lot of moss growing there, 
so it's slippery. Take care to watch your feet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Y- yes. Thank you for your concern. 
And I apologize for my inexperience…

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, you don't need to apologize. Look, we're almost to the 
campsite! Once we get there, we can have lunch——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Oh no…… Looks like we got got.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh!! The campsite is ruined! 
The tent is in tatters, and the food, it's all——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Muddy prints that look like a little kid's hands… 
And they only went after the sweet stuff. 
Pretty safe to assume some raccoons did this.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
I even went to the trouble of hanging up the food on branches so they 
couldn't reach—— But it seems these raccoons were sharp. There's a 
few signs that they shook the food down.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: (Oh, no… This is unthinkable…)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(The two of them were working from the crack 
of dawn to build this campsite, but now——)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
——Let's eat first! We still have the vegetables Bouquet-san picked, 
and thankfully the raccoons didn't go after the fish we caught.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
We can clean up the campsite after we fill our bellies. 
Let's take this as an opportunity for us to make 
the campsite sturdier than it was before!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! Actually, I noticed a lot of vines growing back when we were climbing that tree. We can use those as rope and toughen up the tent ♪

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me, I saw some senburi herbs earlier… 
I think I'll put those in the same sort of bag we put the food in, 
and hang them up next to each other.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Nice idea! A fake to trap them, huh! Those raccoons are in for a bitter treat if they try to swipe our stuff again. All right, anyway—— You okay with lunch, Bouquet?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Er, I, y-yes, I am, but…!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. It's just… I was taken aback once 
again by how tenacious the two of you are.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
You are like the noble acacia. Even in the most unforgiving deserts, 
you bury your roots deep in the ground, sure and true, so that you may 
bless the earth with lush green.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
The two of you bear a grace and strength—— 
That I feel no one else could.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
That's the core concept behind these outfits. 
These clothes only shine when Bakushin O-chan and I wear them 
together. No one else could ever pull them off like we do!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Oh. You're still awake? Aren't you tired from all that work on the campsite? You ought to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
…I will. It's just… the sound of the brook was so lovely. 
I wanted to keep listening to it a bit longer…

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Right… 
………

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Say. When it's just the two of us sitting by the river like this… 
It reminds you of how we met, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Hmmm…… Looks like the fish are really on guard today. I make the tiniest movement and they scatter right away… …Maybe a new predator moved in around here?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Well, either way, at this rate I won't catch enough to eat. Let's see if there's any bushes around here—— Ah, perfect!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(——…Yeah, this one's big enough for me to hide in. 
Now…… …)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(Erase my presence… Wait for the perfect chance. When a fish lets 
its guard down and gets too close, take the spear and——!）
(CLANG!! Clatter…)

text_block_list.name: Tact and Heart
text_block_list.text: Huh…!?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, you wouldn't believe how surprised I was! You hid yourself so 
well, I couldn't tell there was someone else there until the second our 
spears hit each other!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, I was just as surprised…! Surprised, but… 
I felt moved, too. I never thought I would meet another 
student like you in Tokyo——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
What started as a coincidence became the first of our many trips 
together to train in the mountains… …That irreplaceable encounter 
changed everything for me.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Really? If anything, I think you're the one who 
changed everything for me.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
——See, to tell the truth, that was… Right after an exhibition race. The 
other racers in my generation totally crushed me.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
I'd seen their backs speeding past me so often, they were seared into 
my eyes. And I was forced to see that sight one more time.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Out of the four of us, I was the one who kept racing on the front lines 
the longest. I took pride in that. But… I can't deny it made losing 
a little hard to bear.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't want to lose the will to keep getting up. 
I didn't want to break. 
Clinging desperately to that will, I went out to the mountains——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: ——And what awaited me… was a chance encounter with you.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: "Oh… Are you a new student at Tracen? Are you sure you want to spend your weekend out here like this? Didn't you just get into the Academy?"

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"Yes. Enrolling in the academy made me truly understand just how 
high-level the racers there are. …So I thought it would be best if I 
took some time to straighten myself out."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"I've learned so many important things from nature. 
It taught me the beauty that lies in life, in racing—— 
And it taught me about the hardships."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"But that taught me something greater. It taught me the grace to 
accept life's many hardships—— And the bravery to keep 
moving forward without fear."

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
——Hey, Tact? When you look at me, what is it that you see? 
How do you feel about me?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Whatever it is, that's probably how I feel about you. 
Because I think deep down, you and I are totally alike!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
We have the same will. The same grace. 
And the same bravery, deep within our hearts—— 
The fact that two of us met that day proves it.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: H-Heart-san…!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(The same heart, dyed in the same colors. 
That strength, that bravery… 
It belongs to the two of us, and us alone——)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(We could only reach it together. 
We're the only ones who can make each other shine like this!)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
——Hey, Tact? 
『Hey, little bird, what's got you down?』

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
! ……『Those blue, blue days 
Are when the sun comes out.』

text_block_list.name: Heart and Tact
text_block_list.text:
『So lift those wings and take to flight 
'Cause blue skies are all right.』

text_block_list.name: Heart and Tact
text_block_list.text: ——…Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: …Heart-san. I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Once we return to the academy, would you be willing to talk 
about our outfits again?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: I… I've found the color I can only wear with you!
